raw_output: Once upon a time, in the kingdom of Eldoria, there lived a knight named Sir Borin, whose courage was as legendary as the stars. When a fearsome dragon began to terrorize the land by hoarding the kingdom’s treasures in a hidden cave beneath the highest mountain, Sir Borin knew he must act. With his trusty sword and a heart brimming with resolve, he set off through the dense forests, the cold wind biting at his cloak. The climb to the peak was grueling—steep slopes, icy rivers, and shadows that seemed to whisper warnings. Yet Sir Borin pressed on, his determination unshaken. At last, he reached the summit of the mountain, where the dragon lay slumbering. In a single, bold strike, he ended the threat, saving his people and becoming a hero forever remembered. The kingdom celebrated, and the mountain stood tall as a symbol of his bravery.
